items.title: Dems Won't Hold Midterm Convention Amid Fundraising Crunch
items.description: The Democratic National Committee said it will not go forward with a midterm convention as the party continues to lag in fundraising.

items.title: Rep. Fallon to Newsmax: No Rhyme or Reason to Iran's Strategy
items.description: Rep. Pat Fallon, R-Texas, told Newsmax on Monday that Iran is shooting at random since the U.S. and Israel launched airstrikes against the country.
